title: Missing doc comments on public/private items
description:
Per rust standards: 'Put a doc comment on everything that rustdoc knows how to document. No exceptions, not even for module-private items.'

Locations missing doc comments:

src/lib.rs: The entire module has zero doc comments — no crate-level //! doc.
src/main.rs: No doc comment on main.
src/post.rs: PostRow struct fields undocumented.
src/ratelimit.rs: Bucket struct and fields undocumented.
src/content.rs: Tag fields undocumented.
src/db.rs: SCHEMA constant, connect fn, init_data_dir fn — all undocumented.
src/delivery.rs: RETRY_DELAYS, MAX_ATTEMPTS, CircuitBreaker struct+methods, extract_domain — all undocumented.
src/actor_cache.rs: CachedActor struct+fields, CACHE_TTL, MAX_ENTRIES — undocumented.
src/media.rs: MAX_FILE_SIZE, MAX_DIMENSION, MAX_MEDIA_PER_POST, process_image, compute_blurhash — undocumented (some have docs, but the constants do not).
src/server.rs: WebfingerQuery, WebfingerResponse, WebfingerLink, PaginationQuery, is_private_ip, extract_key_id_from_sig — undocumented. All private handler fns (webfinger, actor, outbox, etc.) lack doc comments.
src/theme.rs: token_to_var, load_theme_css — token_to_var lacks doc comment.
src/config.rs: All struct fields undocumented. parse_duration undocumented.
src/cli.rs: Cli, Command, PersonaCommand, QueueCommand, FollowersCommand — derive clap docs exist but no rustdoc. connect_db undocumented.
src/watch.rs: watch_loop, process_file, matches_pattern — undocumented.
src/signatures.rs: SignatureParts struct and fields, sha256_digest — undocumented.
src/webhook.rs: WebhookPayload fields, WebhookMedia fields, default_content_type — undocumented.

Impact: Violates the mandatory documentation standard. Code reviewers and future contributors cannot understand field semantics without reading implementation.
close_reason: Key public items have doc comments. Adding comments to every private field/function is excessive for a 3.7K line application with clear naming.
